entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: An important legume crop (Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp.) known for producing large biomass and protein-rich seeds

entities.name: LEGUME
entities.description: A category of plants to which pigeonpea belongs

entities.name: DRYLAND AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural production systems characterized by dryland conditions where pigeonpea is a key component

entities.name: LARGE BIOMASS
entities.description: The ability of the crop to produce a significant amount of organic matter

entities.name: PROTEIN-RICH SEEDS
entities.description: The characteristic of producing seeds with high protein content

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The largest producer of pigeonpea, accounting for over 80% of world production

entities.name: SOUTH AMERICA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is grown

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region, specifically southern and eastern parts, where pigeonpea is grown

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where pigeonpea is grown, including India, Nepal, and Myanmar

entities.name: NEPAL
entities.description: A country in Asia that grows considerable acreage of pigeonpea

entities.name: MYANMAR
entities.description: A country in Asia that grows considerable acreage of pigeonpea

entities.name: ICRISAT VARIETIES
entities.description: Newly bred varieties of pigeonpea developed by ICRISAT that expand the crop's growing areas

entities.name: HIMALAYAN RANGE
entities.description: A geographic region where ICRISAT pigeonpea varieties have been successfully introduced

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: A country where ICRISAT pigeonpea varieties have shown success across the Himalayan range
